tabs.name: main
tabs.code:
# @viz
def create_graph():
	graph = Graph()
 
	nodes_info=[None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None]
	nodes = [graph.add_node(info) for info in nodes_info]
 
	positions = [(3,3), (3,6), (3,9), (7,12), (3,12), (7,9), (12,9), (9,6), (12,6), (9,3), (6,3)]
	for node, position in zip(nodes, positions):
		node._viz.x, node._viz.y = position
        
	connections = [(0,1),(1,2),(2,3),(3,4),(4,2),(2,5),(5,3),(5,6),(1,7),(7,8),(8,6),(7,9),(0,10),(10,9)]
	edge_info =[None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None]
	for (i,j), info in zip(connections, edge_info):
		edge = graph.add_edge(nodes[i], nodes[j], info)
		edge._viz.set_start(nodes[i]._viz.x, nodes[i]._viz.y)
		edge._viz.set_end(nodes[j]._viz.x, nodes[j]._viz.y)
 
	return graph

buttons_panel = create_buttons()

run_dfs_btn = LabeledRect(label='SCC', x=9)
run_dfs_btn.rect.on_click = lambda x, y: dfs_conn_comp(graph)
buttons_panel.add(run_dfs_btn)
            
graph = no_debug(create_graph)()

EDGE_SUPER_COLOR     = ( 160, 70, 120)

no_trace()
# @end


def dfs_conn_comp(graph: Graph):
    v_time = dict()
    v_low = dict()
    time = [0]
    stack = []

    def _dfs(node: Node, parent_edge: Edge | None):
        if node in v_time:
            # @viz
            dfs_arrow.x = node._viz.x+1
            dfs_arrow.y = node._viz.y+1

            if parent_edge is not None:
                parent_edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_VISIT_COLOR)
            # @end
            return
        stack.append(node)
        v_low[node] = time[0]
        v_time[node] = time[0]
        time[0] += 1
        # @viz
        dfs_arrow.x = node._viz.x+1
        dfs_arrow.y = node._viz.y+1

        node._viz.set_label(f'{v_time[node]},{v_low[node]}')
        node._viz.set_color(NODE_VISIT_COLOR)

        if parent_edge is not None:
            parent_edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_VISIT_COLOR)
        # @end

        for edge in node.outgoing:
            _dfs(edge.to_node, edge)        
            v_low[node] = min(v_low[node], v_low[edge.to_node])
            # @viz  
            dfs_arrow.x = node._viz.x+1
            dfs_arrow.y=node._viz.y+1
            node._viz.set_label(f'{v_time[node]},{v_low[node]}')

            if v_low[node] < v_low[edge.to_node]:
                edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_SUPER_COLOR)
            else:
                edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_FINISH_COLOR)
            # @end        

        if v_low[node] == v_time[node]:
            component = []
            while len(stack) > 0:
                v = stack.pop()
                component.append(v)
                # @viz
                v._viz.set_color(NODE_FINISH_COLOR)
                # @end
                if v == node:
                    break
    
    # @viz
    dfs_arrow = Arrow(angle=-45)
    no_trace()
    # @end
    for v in graph.nodes:
        _dfs(v, None)
    # @viz
    dfs_arrow.delete()
    # @end
